power.method: Rechargeable 2x 18650 Li-Ion battery (+ optional solar); pairs to an Akku-Kamera Pro base station

storage.notes: Records to the base station's USB stick (up to 128GB); no in-camera microSD.

features: 100% wire-free battery camera (add-on for the Akku-Kamera Pro base)
release_notes: ABUS Akku-Kamera Pro add-on battery camera. App-only (App2Cam Plus / ABUS One) — no ONVIF/RTSP; requires an Akku-Kamera Pro base station. Pairs with the existing PPIC91000 set.

frigate.notes: App-only ABUS battery camera (App2Cam Plus) — no ONVIF/RTSP; local NVR/Frigate not supported.
